title: Player Health Indicator Plus
description: A mod that displays player health, armor, and equipment information.
body:
---

☕ Support My Work

If you would like to support me and my projects, feel free to buy me a coffee!


--- # Player Health Indicator Plus Player Health Indicator Plus is a mod designed to enhance your experience by rendering player statistics directly above their heads. # Features - Numeric Health Display: Shows exact HP (including absorption) or "Creative" status. - Get health from tablist (gets health from tablist) works on hoplite as the health is obfuscated normally. - Armor Durability & Tiers: Displays armor type and remaining durability percentages. - Armor Tiers: - Leather = L - Chain = Ch - Iron = I - Gold = G - Diamond = D - Netherite = N - Elytra = E - Armor Slots: - Head = H - Chest = C - Legs = L - Feet = B - Example: A full-durability Netherite Chestplate will display as "NC 100%" - Example: Damaged Iron Helmet will display as "IH 75%" - Equipment Tracking: See what other players are holding in their Main Hand and Off-hand. - Network Info: Integrated Ping (latency) display and distance tracking in meters. - Highly Customizable: Adjust text color, height, brightness, and size. - Toggle visibility for invisible players. # How to use - Go into minecraft settings and set a keybind for the gui.
